response.justification: Well over the required 6 years of full-stack experience with the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes), plus current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work that directly matches the role's AI agent development requirement. Strong testing culture (TDD, test-framework authorship, testing workshops) and demonstrated architecture ownership across product and infrastructure work. Main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js and Kotlin experience, though the breadth of languages suggests fast ramp-up.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple senior product roles
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work matches a rare role requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses)
concerns: Kotlin absent and Java exposure appears dated/limited
Vitest/Playwright not specifically mentioned despite broad testing background
